name: Phyllis Diller's Mexicale Hot Stuff Party Din
recipeIngredient: 1 can Tomatoes with Green Chiles (10 1/2 oz can)
Add diced chiles, oregano, cumin, garlic powder, chili powder to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown ground beef, stirring frequently to keep it crumbly.
2. Combine the meat with onion, creamed corn, tomatoes with green chiles, enchilada sauce, cheddar cheese, ripe olives, and diced green chiles, oregano, cumin, garlic powder, and chili powder to taste.
3. Tear 3 tortillas into pieces and spread over the bottom of an 11x7x2 baking dish.
4. Spread half of the meat mixture over the torn tortillas.
5. Tear remaining tortillas and spread them over the meat layer.
6. Top with the remaining meat mixture.
7. Sprinkle with grated Monterey Jack cheese.
8. Bake at 325°F for 30 minutes.
